'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 17''' was published in [[February]] [[1979]] by [[Paradise Press]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"Escape Through [[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]]," by [[John Chesterman]]: a vignette describing the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]''{{'s}} escape from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
*"Near Encounter With an Alien Body", by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: an article on [[Wikipedia:Voyager 1|Voyager 1's]] recent encounter with [[Wikipedia:Jupiter|Jupiter]].
*"Introducing the Intergalactic Inker...[[Russ Manning]]," by [[John May]]: an interview with the artist producing numerous ''[[Star Wars]]'' black-and-white newspaper comic strips (many of which were collected much later in ''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]''.)
